---
title: "Projects"

listing:
  - id: projects
    contents: "*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    fields: [image, title, description, date, categories]
    categories: true
    image-height: 220px

page-layout: full
include-back-link: false
toc: false
---

:::{#projects}
:::
